status: constant-time discipline inventory only; current code is toy/reference scaffolding; no security claim
threat_model: local timing/cache observer of encapsulation or decapsulation; public parameters and public samples are visible; Lagrangian membership, selected secret state, decoder paths, message bits, and noise bits are secret until explicitly serialized for KAT diagnostics
scope: impl/polar_validation SC/SCL decoder used by the toy KAT rail

inventory.issue: FixedLagrangian bitset scaffold now enforces the exact public Lagrangian point count, uses full-slice masked range validation, fixed max-word backing storage, routes public-sample label generation and toy KAT part builders through a FixedLagrangian boundary, centralizes toy label generation through membership_labels, supports caller-owned label buffers via membership_labels_into, fills public-sample membership labels in-place before noise xor, and derives toy membership labels through a single contains_mask lookup path, and has an explicit bounded reference layout via LSN_REF_MAX_FIXED_LAGRANGIAN_N, but diagnostic selectors, bounded toy sizing, and leakage audit remain non-production
inventory.required_action: replace diagnostic membership, replace the bounded toy layout with a reviewed production-sized layout, check generated code for data-oblivious access, and run an independent timing/leakage audit before any production claim

inventory.surface: public-sample selection and toy divergent diagnostic selector
inventory.issue: diagnostic selector depends on the wrong secret, is intentionally outside the public LSN distribution, and is isolated behind an explicit diagnostic_honest_only_point_masks fixed-shape mask boundary before deriving the legacy diagnostic_honest_only_points list
inventory.required_action: keep divergent diagnostics out of production APIs and use random-public-samples profiles for public-distribution KAT plumbing

inventory.issue: polar SCL path pruning uses data-dependent metrics, sorting, branching, heap-like vector growth, and floating-point operations; see experiments/186-codex-polar-scl-workshape-audit.json
inventory.required_action: fixed-schedule integer decoder plan required: replace with fixed-list, fixed-schedule, integer or masked metric updates and data-oblivious selection

inventory.issue: XorShift/LCG randomness and toy hash lanes are deterministic test scaffolding, not production cryptographic primitives
inventory.required_action: replace with an approved DRBG/KDF and define serialization, domain separation, and failure handling

inventory.issue: KATs intentionally serialize secrets, public samples, labels, selected indices, and wrong-secret controls
inventory.required_action: keep KAT serialization outside production APIs and gate it behind explicit test-only tooling
